allow:
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from show_tracker.identification.parser import parse_media_string
for inp, src in [
    \('L&O SVU 3x07 Sacrifice', 'youtube'\),
    \('HIMYM S04E01 Do I Know You', 'filename'\),
    \('IASIP S16E01', 'filename'\),
    \('TBBT S12E24 The Stockholm Syndrome', 'filename'\),
]:
    r = parse_media_string\(inp, src\)
    print\(f'{inp!r:50s} -> title={r.title!r}, S{r.season}E{r.episode}'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from show_tracker.identification.parser import parse_media_string
tests = [
    \('The Last of Us Season 1 Episode 3 | HBO Max', 'browser_title'\),
    \('Naruto 135', 'filename'\),
]
for inp, src in tests:
    r = parse_media_string\(inp, src\)
    print\(f'{inp!r:55s} -> title={r.title!r}, S{r.season}E{r.episode}'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from guessit import guessit
print\(guessit\('The Last of Us Season 1 Episode 3'\)\)
print\(\)
print\(guessit\('Naruto 135'\)\)
")
